channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Kotlin: Backend Boost
item.description: Unlock efficient backend development with Kotlin. Learn how it boosts productivity.

item.title: AI Done Right
item.description: Learn how to implement AI ethically & responsibly with expert insights.

item.title: Boost App Speed
item.description: Improve app speed & user experience with expert tips on Application Performance Monitoring.

item.title: DDoS Defense
item.description: Learn effective DDoS protection strategies to safeguard your website from cyber threats.

item.title: Agile Done Right
item.description: Master Agile development with proven methodologies and best practices.

item.title: Vision Tech
item.description: Discover latest Computer Vision tech & its applications

item.title: VecDBs
item.description: Unlock efficient data search with VecDBs & embeddings. Learn how vector databases revolutionize query performance.

item.title: Contribute Open Source
item.description: Start contributing to open source projects with our beginner's guide.

item.title: Unlock SOC 2 & ISO 27001
item.description: Simplify security compliance with expert guides to SOC 2 & ISO 27001 certification.

item.title: GraphQL Unlocked
item.description: Unlock the power of GraphQL API development. Learn expert techniques and best practices.

item.title: Flutter Fast
item.description: Accelerate mobile app dev with Flutter Fast. Learn expert tips and tricks.

item.title: VR Beyond Gaming
item.description: Explore VR's vast potential beyond gaming, transforming industries & revolutionizing experiences.

item.title: Secure Your App
item.description: Protect your app from threats. Learn expert mobile app security tips and best practices.

item.title: IoT Device Control
item.description: Secure & manage IoT devices with ease. Learn expert tips & best practices.

item.title: Git Pro Tips
item.description: Boost Git skills with expert tips and tricks for advanced techniques.

item.title: WAF: Shield Your Site
item.description: Protect your site from threats with a Web Application Firewall (WAF). Learn how to shield your site from cyber attacks.

item.title: Index Smarter
item.description: Boost query performance with expert database indexing strategies.

item.title: Secure Code
item.description: Boost app security with SAST & DAST testing, learn how to write secure code

item.title: Log On: Simplify
item.description: Simplify log management with our expert solutions. Streamline monitoring & analysis.

item.title: ES6+ Essentials
item.description: Master modern JavaScript with ES6+ essentials: learn arrow functions, destructuring, and more.
